events.summary: v7.8 bootstrap: feature stub created at .claude/features/framework-v7-8-branch-isolation/state.json. Backlog entry added to docs/product/backlog.md High Priority (Architecture & Framework). Trigger incident: HADF Phase 2 fingerprinting campaign (2026-04-30) — long-running launchd-driven background job anchored to canonical repo path instead of an isolated feature/ worktree; wrapper relative writes resolved against launchd WorkingDirectory; canonical jsonl landed in wrong tree; required mid-flight isolation + restart + remerge. Primary deliverable: write-time + cycle-time gate BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION.

State.json + log.json landed on main via PR-I (full-repair-mode plan, Decision 4 = A) on 2026-05-05. Original capture date was 2026-04-30 (kept in state.json::created_at + first log event); this event is the on-main landing event so the PHASE_TRANSITION_NO_LOG gate sees a fresh entry within the 15-min freshness window.

Phase 0 (Research) approved by user. 7 open questions locked into design decisions: Mode B for infra (every commit) + Mode C for non-infra (current_phase mutations); auto-invoke superpowers:using-git-worktrees on gate fire; per-feature isolation_opt_out with infra override; process cwd at write-time + macOS plist scan as advisory; bidirectional PR-list parity for FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS; kill_criteria_resolution required when kill_criteria set + pre-merge-review verification. Synthesis from 3 prior research notes.

Phase 1 (PRD) opened after user approval of Phase 0 exit criteria. PRD scope: lock 7 design decisions into machine-verifiable specs (gate triggers, schema additions, exemption mechanisms, regex patterns, override flows). Authored against research.md decisions section.

Phase 1 (PRD) approved by user. 629-line PRD covers 7 locked decisions as machine-verifiable specs across 15 sections (gate predicates in pseudocode, schema additions, pre-commit hook integration, make targets, skill extensions, test plan, acceptance criteria 5-section checklist with 36 boxes, risks, review cadence, rollback). PRD committed at aefc8de + 9e0fd68 on feature/framework-v7-8-branch-isolation. GitHub Issue #243.

Phase 2 (Tasks) opened after user approval of Phase 1 exit criteria. Decomposed PRD §10 acceptance criteria (5 sections, 36 checkboxes) into 28 implementation tasks across 8 blocks (A-H) with v5.1 task-complexity classification (E-core / P-core), dependency graph, skill assignment, effort estimates. Plus T29 = Phase 9 prioritization pass on §11 out-of-scope items. Out-of-scope companion spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-07-branch-isolation-out-of-scope.md + 7 backlog entries seeded into docs/product/backlog.md.

Phase 2 (Tasks) approved by user. 28 implementation tasks decomposed across 8 blocks A-H with v5.1 task-complexity classification + dependency graph + skill assignment. Plus T29 = Phase 9 prioritization pass on §11 out-of-scope items, tracked in 4 places (state.json::phase_9_followup, tasks[T29], tasks.md narrative, out-of-scope.md criteria).

Phase 3 (Integration, since has_ui: false) opened. Composing integration-spec.md covering pre-commit hook integration order, skill API contracts for T20 (superpowers:using-git-worktrees extension) + T21 (/ux + /design pre-merge-review sub-step 6f), backward compatibility with existing 12 write-time + 13 cycle-time codes, error handling + --no-verify bypass + manual_bypass recording, advisory→enforced migration plan.

Phase 3 (Integration) approved. 9-section integration spec covers pre-commit hook integration, T20+T21 skill API contracts, backward compatibility (zero regression on 12+13 existing codes), error handling, file dependency map (18 files), advisory→enforced migration plan, inter-skill awareness, implementation latitude.
Phase 4 (Implementation) opened. Beginning Block A (E-core, parallel sonnet) — 4 schema-addition tasks T1/T2/T3/T4. Block B + C (P-core opus) follow with gate predicate logic.

Phase 4 (Implementation) approved. All 8 blocks (A-H) shipped: 28/28 tasks done. 130/130 unit tests pass; Mechanism D self-audit clean; schema-check 53/53; verify-isolation 53/53 clean; feature-completeness-audit 0 blocking + 1 advisory (forward-only working).
Phase 5 (Test) opened. Extending test-v7-5-pipeline.sh with 4 new integration assertions per PRD §9.2 + running full pipeline end-to-end.

Phase 5 (Test) complete. test-v7-5-pipeline.sh extended to 19 assertions (15 baseline + 4 new for v7.8 framework-v7-8-branch-isolation). All pass. pytest 130/130. schema-check 53/53. integrity-check 0+9 advisory. verify-isolation 53/53. feature-completeness-audit 0 blocking. Mechanism A coverage telemetry confirmed: BRANCH_ISOLATION_VIOLATION + FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS + ISOLATION_OPT_OUT_REASON_MISSING all emit gate-coverage.jsonl entries on every script run.
Phase 6 (Review) opened. Pre-merge code review + /ux + /design pre-merge-review checks against the feature branch.
Phase 6 (Review) closed. Pre-merge-reviews N/A (has_ui:false). Risk surface low. 14 commits, 25 files, +4548/-38. 0 high-risk iOS files touched. Advisory mode; full backward compat verified.
Phase 7 (Merge) opened. Creating PR + waiting for CI before squash-merge.
Phase 8 closure on main worktree (chore branch). Case study committed; state.json reaching complete.
